selected_plan.title: Deliver the first async interview practice MVP
selected_plan.summary: Build a small browser-based experience for session setup, answer capture, rubric feedback, and saved results.

retained_alternatives.title: Chat-only prototype
retained_alternatives.summary: Use a single conversational surface with minimal structure and looser reports.

risk_summary.description: The rubric evaluator may produce weak feedback without tighter structure.
risk_summary.mitigation: Use explicit rubric templates and sample-session testing.

risk_summary.description: Too much setup may reduce first-session completion.
risk_summary.mitigation: Keep the setup flow short and template-driven.

handoff_leaves.title: Define session and feedback domain contracts
handoff_leaves.description: Model the interview session, question sequence, saved result, and rubric summary structures.
handoff_leaves.why: The rest of the MVP depends on having stable session and feedback shapes.
done_criteria: Session and summary data structures are defined
The storage shape supports saved history

verification.description: Review that session and summary structures support the selected approach.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

completion_guardrails.description: Leaf done criteria are satisfied by execution evidence.
completion_guardrails.verification: Map every done criterion to passing verification evidence.

completion_guardrails.verification: Use tests, schema checks, runtime checks, review evidence, or explicit blocker evidence tied to the leaf.

handoff_leaves.title: Implement the browser session flow
handoff_leaves.description: Create the user flow for role selection, question progression, and answer capture.
handoff_leaves.why: The MVP needs a complete path from session start to completed answers.
done_criteria: A user can start and complete a short session
Answers are captured in the selected session structure

verification.description: Walk through the session flow in the browser.

reentry_triggers: If executor-side todo decomposition cannot produce actionable leaves without changing scope, recommend Uigwe local_reexploration.
If execution invalidates the selected design approach, recommend Uigwe brainstorming.
If success criteria, non-goals, or must-preserve behavior are contradicted, recommend deep_interview or human_review.

handoff_leaves.title: Implement feedback generation and saved session history
handoff_leaves.description: Generate a rubric summary for a completed session and make saved reports reviewable later.
handoff_leaves.why: Feedback and recall are the main proof of value for the MVP.
done_criteria: Completed sessions produce saved feedback summaries
Past session summaries can be revisited

verification.description: Complete a session and confirm the saved summary can be reopened.

overall_completion_guardrails.verification: Confirm no open blockers, no unresolved re-entry requests, and no silent success redefinition.
